title: 3. Client data layer
description: Create client data loader for initial fetch and SSE subscription. Maintain in-memory store for config and issues with loading and error states.
creator: Ryan Alyn Porter

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Added client data loader and SSE subscription with in-memory snapshot state and error handling.

custom.beads_acceptance_criteria: App loads initial data; reconnects SSE on drop; updates board on full snapshot events; shows non-blocking error state on fetch failure.
